org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query.Update

Packages that use Update
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
Apache Cassandra core support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.convert
Spring Data Cassandra specific converter infrastructure.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query
Apache Cassandra specific query and update support.

    Method
    Description
    WriteResult
    ExecutableUpdateOperation.TerminatingUpdate.apply(Update update)
    Apply the given Update and execute the complete Cassandra Update statement.
    Mono<WriteResult>
    ReactiveUpdateOperation.TerminatingUpdate.apply(Update update)
    Update all matching rows in the table.
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    AsyncCassandraOperations.update(Query query, Update update, Class<?> entityClass)
    Update the queried entities and return true if the update was applied.
    CompletableFuture<Boolean>

    boolean

    Update the queried entities and return true if the update was applied.

    Update the queried entities and return true if the update was applied.

    Create an UPDATE statement by mapping Query to Update.
